instruction: In ~/Downloads/mock_downloads, copy only the top-level .png files into ~/Desktop/selected_pngs. Do not copy non-png files or anything inside subdirectories. Then create ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/selected_count.txt containing exactly count=2.
source: 外部参考来源：Canonical tutorial - Command line for beginners (https://ubuntu.com/tutorials/command-line-for-beginners)

parameters.command:
rm -rf ~/Downloads/mock_downloads ~/Desktop/selected_pngs && mkdir -p ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/subdir && printf 'png1
' > ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/chart.png && printf 'png2
' > ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/logo.png && printf 'jpg
' > ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/photo.jpg && printf 'nested
' > ~/Downloads/mock_downloads/subdir/deep.png

result.command: present_chart='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/chart.png ] && present_chart='true'; present_logo='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/logo.png ] && present_logo='true'; absent_photo='false'; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/photo.jpg ] && absent_photo='true'; absent_deep='false'; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/deep.png ] && absent_deep='true'; count_ok='false'; status=$(cat ~/Desktop/selected_pngs/selected_count.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$status" = 'count=2' ] && count_ok='true'; echo "present_chart.png=$present_chart"; echo "present_logo.png=$present_logo"; echo "absent_photo.jpg=$absent_photo"; echo "absent_deep.png=$absent_deep"; echo "count_ok=$count_ok"
